_doc: Raven Hollow loot item DB. Consumed by LootSystem (scripts/systems/loot_system.gd). bases = world-drop templates rolled to a target rarity via stat budgets; named_rares = fixed unique items (canon rare-spawn / boss signatures from design/LOOT_TABLES.md). icon_hint resolves through IconsPixel.get_tex as 'pixel:<hint>'.

leather_cap.name: Leather Cap
leather_cap.flavor: Cracked at the brow. It has seen weather.

padded_coif.name: Padded Coif
padded_coif.flavor: Quilted against the cold and the club.

boiled_leather.name: Boiled Leather Vest
boiled_leather.flavor: Hardened in a tanner's pot behind the fords.

ringmail_vest.name: Ringmail Vest
ringmail_vest.flavor: Each ring closed by a smith who is dead now.

chainmail_hauberk.name: Chainmail Hauberk
chainmail_hauberk.flavor: Heavy the way safety is heavy.

studded_greaves.name: Studded Greaves
studded_greaves.flavor: Iron studs cold against the shin.

plated_legguards.name: Plated Legguards
plated_legguards.flavor: The knees were re-hammered more than once.

traveler_shoes.name: Traveler's Shoes
traveler_shoes.flavor: The soles remember a longer road.

scout_boots.name: Scout Boots
scout_boots.flavor: Cut soft so the watch never heard them.

heavy_sabatons.name: Heavy Sabatons
heavy_sabatons.flavor: You will not be knocked back easily.

bent_dagger.name: Bent Dagger
bent_dagger.flavor: It still finds the gap in a guard.

notched_axe.name: Notched Axe
notched_axe.flavor: Every notch was a bad morning for someone.

warhammer.name: Warhammer
warhammer.flavor: Swung by the arm and the shoulder both.

rusty_flail.name: Rusty Flail
rusty_flail.flavor: Unpredictable. That is the point of it.

cracked_buckler.name: Cracked Buckler
cracked_buckler.flavor: One good blow left in it. Choose which.

round_shield.name: Round Shield
round_shield.flavor: Boards and a boss of dull iron.

bog_targe.name: Bog-Iron Targe
bog_targe.flavor: River-fed iron, the color of old blood.

iron_ward.name: Iron Ward
iron_ward.flavor: Struck flat, it rings like a warning bell.

copper_band.name: Copper Band
copper_band.flavor: Green where it kisses the skin.

iron_signet.name: Iron Signet
iron_signet.flavor: A crest worn smooth past reading.

bone_ring.name: Bone Ring
bone_ring.flavor: Carved from something that did not consent.

luck_coin.name: Bent Luck-Coin
luck_coin.flavor: Kept for the toss you never make.

bone_totem.name: Bone Totem
bone_totem.flavor: It hums when the dead are near, which is often.

whitepelt_cloak.name: Whitepelt Cloak
whitepelt_cloak.flavor: The pack howled; she wore the pack.

vascas_second_knife.name: Vasca's Second Knife
vascas_second_knife.flavor: The one she keeps for after the handshake.

drakescale_round_shield.name: Drakescale Round Shield
drakescale_round_shield.flavor: Scales off a thing the fork river argued up.

mourncoat_ruff.name: Mourncoat Ruff
mourncoat_ruff.flavor: Greywolves are never alone. This one was.

cinderbrand_rod.name: Cinderbrand Rod
cinderbrand_rod.flavor: Warm at the tip long after the fire is out.

dragans_toll_hammer.name: Dragan's Toll Hammer
dragans_toll_hammer.flavor: Every crossing has a price. This collected it.

kerbstone_greatblade.name: Kerbstone Greatblade
kerbstone_greatblade.flavor: Ground sharp on a stone that keeps getting shorter.

coppertongue_mantle.name: Coppertongue Mantle
coppertongue_mantle.flavor: It drank at the one clean well at dusk.

pilgrims_copper_wraps.name: Pilgrim's Copper Wraps
pilgrims_copper_wraps.flavor: It circled the live stone until it forgot how to stop.

fasting_cord_cinch.name: Fasting-Cord Cinch
fasting_cord_cinch.flavor: Knotted once for each meal refused.

ribcage_collar.name: Ribcage Collar
ribcage_collar.flavor: The longer the fight, the harder it bites.

guildless_gloves.name: Guildless Gloves
guildless_gloves.flavor: They lifted your purse and gave it back, once.

wells_warning_band.name: Well's-Warning Band
wells_warning_band.flavor: It cools when something below is listening.

tunnelers_claws.name: Tunneler's Claws
tunnelers_claws.flavor: Pried from what digs below the copper wells.

carapace_kite_shield.name: Carapace Kite Shield
carapace_kite_shield.flavor: Chitin plate, still faintly warm to the palm.

the_bent_oars_luck.name: The Bent Oar's Luck
the_bent_oars_luck.flavor: The tavern that floated when the quarter drowned.
